title: ITR-1 Ineligible — Business Income Exists
description: A taxpayer who has any income under the head 'Profits and Gains of Business or Profession' cannot file ITR-1 (Sahaj), regardless of the amount.

logic.if: taxpayer.income.business_income IS NOT NULL AND taxpayer.income.business_income > 0
logic.then: itr_form = ITR-1 is INVALID. Taxpayer must use ITR-3 or ITR-4.
logic.else: Business income disqualifier does not apply.

notes: Applies to ALL business income including freelance/gig income taxable as business income. See also R-0005 (ITR-4 presumptive eligibility) for the alternative form.
